diagnostics.candidate_sql: SELECT p.category AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS orders FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') AND DATE_TRUNC(DATE(oi.created_at), MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH) GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
diagnostics.report_answer: Outerwear & Coats generated the most revenue last month, totaling $48,082.76 from 327 orders.
report_highlights: Outerwear & Coats was the top revenue-driving category.
Jeans followed closely as the second-highest revenue category.

results.detail: intent=1.00, calculation=0.00, recall@3=1.00, mrr=0.50, ndcg@3=0.63, retrieval_use=1.00, retrieval_harm=0.00%, faithfulness=1.00, multi_turn=1.00, usefulness=pending, operational=0.00, report=complete, sql_source=verified, behavior=matched, failed_constraints=none

diagnostics.candidate_sql:
SELECT u.state AS state, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN oi.sale_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS lost_revenue_to_returns FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND DATE_TRUNC(DATE(oi.created_at), QUARTER) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 QUARTER), QUARTER) GROUP BY state ORDER BY lost_revenue_to_returns DESC
LIMIT 100
diagnostics.report_answer: Lost revenue to returns for order items created last quarter:
report_highlights: California: $4,695.70
New York: $1,697.71
